description.overview: Bull Terriers are unique dogs with egg-shaped heads and playful personalities. They're muscular, mischievous, and full of personality.
description.temperament: Bull Terriers are playful, charming, and mischievous. They're devoted to their families and can be clownish. Need firm, consistent training.
description.health: Prone to deafness (especially white dogs), heart problems, skin allergies, and kidney issues.
description.exercise: High exercise needs. Need vigorous daily activity and mental stimulation to prevent destructive behavior.

best_for: Those who enjoy a unique-looking dog
not_for: Families with small children or pets
verdict.summary: Unique, mischievous clowns that need experienced owners. Bull Terriers are devoted and entertaining but require firm training and lots of exercise. Best for active owners who appreciate their quirky personalities.
